title: croton potabilis
intro: Croton potabilis, also known as Croton lechleri, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest and other parts of South America, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anthraquinone content. The health benefits of Croton potabilis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and other gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are typically extracted and used to create tinctures, capsules, and other supplements that can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal conditions.
